product_name: SIODIL A-D Shampoo 200ml
product_description:
Siodil A-D Shampoo is a specially formulated shampoo designed to effectively combat dandruff and relieve scalp irritation. It contains a powerful combination of active ingredients, including Zinc Pyrithione, Piroctone Olamine, and Salicylic Acid, that work together to provide deep cleansing while nourishing the scalp, preventing the growth of dandruff-causing fungi, and removing dead skin cells.
Skin Concern
Dandruff and Dry scalp
Ingredients based benefits
Zinc Pyrithione is an antifungal and antibacterial agent that helps to control the growth of Malassezia fungi, which are known to cause dandruff. It also helps to reduce inflammation and soothe the scalp.
Piroctone Olamine is another antifungal ingredient that targets yeast that can contribute to dandruff. It works by disrupting the cell membranes of the yeast, preventing them from reproducing and spreading.
Salicylic Acid has keratolytic properties that help to remove dead skin cells and unclog hair follicles. It works by penetrating the skin and dissolving the bonds that hold dead skin cells. It also has anti-inflammatory properties that can help to soothe an irritated scalp.
Barcode: 8941153901313

product_name: SIODIL Blue Shampoo 100ml
product_description:
Siodil Blue Shampoo, with its innovative mix of Ketoconazole and Salicylic Acid, is specifically intended to treat and prevent fungal infections of the scalp, such as seborrheic dermatitis. The shampoo reduces the symptoms of these conditions by targeting the fungus responsible for their development.
Skin Concern
Fungal infections of the scalp
Ingredients based benefits
Ketoconazole is an antifungal ingredient that works by inhibiting the growth and reproduction of fungi. It prevents the production of ergosterol, an essential component of fungal cell membranes, and disrupts the structure and function of these membranes, leading to the death of the fungi.
Salicylic Acid is a Beta-Hydroxy Acid (BHA) that works by breaking down and dissolving the dead skin cells on the scalp, unclogging the hair follicles, and reducing the buildup of oil and debris. This action helps to prevent fungal infections and promotes healthy hair growth.
